rag_rules: Place input range assumptions in component type annexes when concrete bounds or visible relations are available
Use assign only for output features or auxiliary variables in implementation annexes
Avoid placing guarantees in implementation annexes
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
generic_rules: Use named constants or visible relations for concrete bounds in assumptions and guarantees
Align helper declaration types with expression types to avoid type mismatches
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes
Use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Avoid range comparisons or 0/1 equality over Boolean, enumeration-like, or opaque data ports
Do not place guarantees in implementation annexes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
